name: Golf Cove
about: Golf Cove is an indoor golf and multisport facility located in North Haven, Connecticut. It features a selection of virtual golf simulators alongside a multisport arcade offering games like soccer and hockey. The venue operates with a full-service kitchen and bar, providing restaurant-quality food and craft cocktails. It offers a variety of membership levels and is equipped with private event spaces suitable for birthdays, corporate gatherings, and family celebrations. The facility uses advanced technology to provide a realistic virtual sports experience for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulators provide a realistic and engaging virtual golf experience
Full-service bar and kitchen offering restaurant-quality food and cocktails
Private rooms allow for a secluded social or practice environment
Membership structure offers significant savings and priority booking

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with a variety of food options available for events or on-site dining
Full-service bar offering craft beers, cocktails, and other beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether you can bring your own clubs or if rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service kitchen and bar offering food and drinks for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website mentions a 3-hour maximum reservation time per visit, which would likely be sufficient for a round of 18 holes.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is described as a place with 'something for everyone,' and offers a multisport arcade, making it suitable for children and families.
